description: Betrothal deed from 1185. According to Goitein, the bride and groom are also cousins. They are both extremely young, but still in the age of legal majority as can be seen in the expression of mutual consent in line 5. (Med. Soc. 3:29, no. 7.) Groom: Abū Saʿd b. Manṣūr ha-Kohen known as Ibn Sahlān. Bride: Naẓar (or Naṣr?) bt. Abū l-Fakhr known as Ibn Sahlān.
description_he: שטר קידושין מ-1185, בין בני דודים צעירים, אבו סעד בן מנצור הכהן ונצ'ר בת אבו אל-פח'ר
